positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a soaring hummingbird hovering before a vibrant, stylized tropical flower (like a hibiscus or orchid). The composition should be centered, with the silhouette of the bird and flower forming a dynamic, elegant S-curve. Use high contrast black ink against a stark white background, accented only by deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, ruby red) limited to the flower's internal details. Style: sophisticated botanical line art mixed with geometric abstraction. Ensure clean lines, bold shapes, and perfect symmetry suitable for a repeat apparel print. Focus on negative space.
negative: photorealism, complex textures, messy, grunge, logo, signature, text, watermark, artifacts, noise, blurry, extra limbs, bad anatomy, oversaturated, gradients
